data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: WhatsApp simplifies choices to make decisions faster, like in message interactions.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic design with clear options to prevent choice overload.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: The app design facilitates quick selection of commonly used features through larger touch targets.
data.technical_spec: Strategically placed buttons and icons to accommodate finger size.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Keeps interface clean, aligning with users’ ability to process 7±2 items.
data.technical_spec: Uses grouping and minimal layers in the UI for navigation efficiency.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Adopts familiar design patterns to leverage users’ prior knowledge.
data.technical_spec: Conventional chat app layout and interaction models.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Focuses on creating an aesthetically pleasing interface that users find intuitive.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes modern design elements and consistent color schemes.
